title: prunus × lannesiana f. sirotae
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. sirotae, a deciduous shrub or small tree, is a cultivar of the Prunus lannesiana species, commonly known as the Japanese flowering cherry. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. sirotae include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
